Working surface only. Canonical state lives in Markdown/JSON and changes solely after explicit acceptance in chat.

How should catalog filtering feel while typing?

A future iteration may filter as you type instead of on navigation. Before speccing it, feel the debounce: type against the real five-skill list and tune until the lag stops being noticeable.

PlaygroundType below — the list reacts with exactly the configured behavior. Nothing you type is exported.

Changed-file summarizergitreview
Test-gap findertestsreview
Release-notes draftergitdocs
API-doc linterdocs
Flaky-test bisectortests

Nothing matches what you typed (yet).

JavaScript is off, so the playground is inert and the sliders are disabled. The full list stays readable above; describe the feel you want in chat instead — for example: “try 150 ms debounce with instant first keystroke”.

Parameters

300 ms
0

The pending marker shows the configured delay while it elapses — that pause is the thing being decided.

Exploring — feel the prototype, then record your conclusion

The prototype is disposable; only these parameters and this conclusion carry forward. There is deliberately no durable record.

Candidate export

Derived live from your working state above. Copy it, paste it in chat, and confirm — this page never updates files by itself.

JavaScript is off, so these copy controls stay disabled. State your decision in chat instead; the agent records it only after your explicit confirmation.
